title: Prediction Market Kalshi Fights Arizona Criminal Charges
message_html: Prediction Market Kalshi Fights Arizona Criminal Charges ...
snippet: Prediction market Kalshi said Tuesday (March 17) that a lawsuit filed by the Arizona attorney general is meritless and that the company looks forward to fighting them in court.
